_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for cws-observe — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk's manifesto declares. The LLM outputs ONLY these fields.

vars.DONE_LEDGER: <path to the done-ledger (perk=redeem); defaults to SWARM_DIR/done-ledger.json>
vars.RUN_LEDGER: <the governed run-ledger evidencing the validator pass (perk=redeem)>
